deliverables.title: Global Mobile Overflow Fix
deliverables.description: Added overflow-x: hidden, max-width: 100vw, and overflow-wrap: anywhere to html/body/#root. Added w-full to all max-w-lg containers across all pages. Added overflow-x-hidden and max-w-[100vw] to all page root divs.

deliverables.title: GraceBattery Bar Mobile Fix
deliverables.description: Reduced SVG sizes, added max-w-full and overflow-hidden to the fixed bar. Both Grace Battery and Dignity Score ring now visible at 390px.

deliverables.title: BottomNav 5-Tab Fix
deliverables.description: Replaced fixed w-12 tab widths with flex-1, reduced text to text-[9px]. All 6 items (5 tabs + More) now fit on 390px screens.

deliverables.title: Page-Specific Mobile Fixes
deliverables.description: Added w-full max-w-[100vw] overflow-x-hidden to root divs of all pages: Home, Dashboard, VampireSlayer, Membership, CommunityCredits, DignityScore, PromisesKeep, GraceChat, JourneyTracker.

deliverables.title: Essentials Box Request Page
deliverables.description: Built /essentials-box page with warm Grace-voiced intro, sign-up gate for unauthenticated users, delivery address form, item preferences, and success confirmation with CTA to talk to Grace. Updated Home.tsx Get My Free Box button to link here.

deliverables.title: Promises Page Nana Label Auth Gate
deliverables.description: Changed the Nana label conditional from profileId check to useAuth user check. Unauthenticated visitors no longer see test account names.

learning.what_worked: Puppeteer with explicit viewport and DPR=2 gave accurate mobile rendering. Chromium headless --window-size flag does NOT accurately represent mobile viewport. Global CSS fixes (overflow-x, overflow-wrap) are more effective than per-page fixes.
learning.what_surprised: The text overflow was NOT caused by content being wider than 390px — all elements were within bounds. The visual overflow in headless screenshots was caused by Chromium's --window-size not matching actual CSS viewport. Puppeteer's page.setViewport() is the correct approach.
learning.next_loop: Race 10 — Focus on Grace conversation quality, onboarding flow clarity, and trust signals. The mobile layout is now solid.
